summary: Extracted the inline fix-loop from run.mjs into an exported `runSimplifyFixLoop` helper in simplify-pass.mjs, enabling behavioral testing of loop logic. Added 4 behavioral tests covering all loop scenarios (no-critical early exit, maxRounds escalation, mid-loop clear, skipped-pass). Fixed dispatch-fail return missing `findings` field, added `"simplify"` to phaseOrder, added escalated case to completion report summary, and increased source-inspection window from 500 to 600 chars.
